name: Coverage: Export .ics from account menu
description: Logged-in user opens the account/profile dropdown and clicks Export .ics; success toast or no error.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click Sign in and wait for the dashboard
Click the account menu / avatar button labeled Account menu or Signed in in the dashboard navbar to open the dropdown
Verify the dropdown shows Profile, Integrations, and Export .ics
Click Export .ics in the account dropdown (data-testid export-ics-button if available)
Verify a success toast about calendar export or timeora.ics, or the Export .ics control remains available without a failure error toast
